canonical_prompt: How many sick leave days do I have remaining this year?
paraphrases: I'm trying to figure out how many sick days I have left for this year, can you tell me?
Can I check how much sick leave I have available for the current year?
I'm a bit confused about how the sick leave policy works - how do I find out how many days I have left this year?
I need to know how many sick leave days I have remaining, is there a way to look this up online?
expected_answer_summary: You can check your remaining sick leave balance by logging into the HR portal under My Leave > Leave Balance, and it resets on January 1st each year.

canonical_prompt: Can I carry forward unused annual leave to the next year?
paraphrases: Hi, I'm planning my vacation for next year, but I still have some leave days left over from this year. Can I roll them over to the new year?
I've got a few unused vacation days, and I was wondering if I can save them up for next year.
I don't understand the policy on carrying over vacation time. Can you clarify if I can bring any unused days forward to the next calendar year?
I'm trying to budget my time off for next year, and I wanted to know if I can carry over any unused leave from this year.
expected_answer_summary: You may carry forward a maximum of 10 unused annual leave days to the next calendar year.

canonical_prompt: How many weeks of paid maternity leave am I entitled to?
paraphrases: I'm expecting a baby and I want to know when I can start taking my maternity leave.
Can you tell me how much time off I get for maternity leave and if it's paid?
I'm trying to plan ahead and I was wondering if you could confirm the maternity leave policy for full-time employees.
How many weeks of paid maternity leave do I get if I'm expecting a baby and I'm a full-time employee?
expected_answer_summary: Full-time employees are entitled to 26 weeks of fully paid maternity leave, which can begin up to 4 weeks before the expected delivery date.

canonical_prompt: Am I eligible for paternity leave and how many days is it?
paraphrases: I work full-time, but I'm not sure if I've been here long enough to qualify for paternity leave - can someone advise on the eligibility criteria?
As a new dad, I'm trying to plan things out and I was wondering if I can get 10 days off when my child is born - do I need to have a certain number of months of service?
I'm getting ready for my child's arrival and I'm unsure about our company's paternity leave policy - can someone tell me if it's paid and how many days it is?
I've been here for a few months now, but I'm still not sure if I'm eligible for paternity leave - can someone clarify the rules and how many days I'd get off?
expected_answer_summary: All full-time employees who have completed 6 months of service are eligible for 10 days of paid paternity leave, to be taken within 3 months of the child's birth.

canonical_prompt: Can I encash my unused leave days instead of taking time off?
paraphrases: I was wondering, can I sell my unused vacation days to a colleague or take the cash instead of using them up?
Do we have a policy where I can get paid for my unused holiday time before I leave the company?
I'm a bit confused about what to do with my leftover days off, can I get cash for them or do I have to use them all up?
When I finally decide to leave the company, is it possible to use my accumulated leave to get a lump sum payment?
expected_answer_summary: Leave encashment is permitted at resignation or retirement, up to 30 days of annual leave at current basic salary rate.

canonical_prompt: What is the process to get emergency leave approved on short notice?
paraphrases: Hey HR, what do I need to do in case of an emergency, like if I need to leave work suddenly?
Could you remind me of the policy for taking emergency leave at short notice?
I'm not sure what to do in a situation where I need to take an emergency leave from work - can you walk me through the process?
What are the steps I need to take to get emergency leave approved quickly, like if I have a family emergency?
expected_answer_summary: Notify direct manager via phone or WhatsApp immediately and submit formal leave request in HR portal within 24 hours with supporting documents as required.

canonical_prompt: What is the company policy on taking unpaid leave of absence?
paraphrases: I'm planning a personal project and I'd like to take some time off, but I'm not sure if I can get unpaid leave - can you clarify the company's policy?
Do we have a set limit on how many days we can take off without pay?
I'm getting ready for a family emergency and I'm wondering if I can take some unpaid leave if I've used up all my paid time off - can you let me know the rules?
I'm trying to plan my vacation and I'm not sure if I can take an extended unpaid leave of absence - can you tell me what the company policy is?
expected_answer_summary: Unpaid leave of up to 30 days may be granted at the manager's discretion after all paid leave is exhausted, with longer leave requiring HR Director approval.

canonical_prompt: How many days of bereavement leave am I allowed when a family member passes away?
paraphrases: What is the policy regarding bereavement leave for immediate and extended family members?
When a family member passes away, how many days of paid bereavement leave am I entitled to?
Can you clarify the number of bereavement days granted for family members who have passed away?
If a close relative or extended family member passes away, what is the bereavement leave policy?
expected_answer_summary: Employees are entitled to a specified number of paid bereavement leave days for immediate and extended family members.

canonical_prompt: When am I required to submit a medical certificate for sick leave?
paraphrases: What's the policy on submitting medical certificates for extended sick leaves?
Do I need a doctor's note for more than two days off due to illness?
I'm not sure - when do I have to provide a medical certificate for taking time off for sick?
How soon after returning to work do I need to give my manager a doctor's note for sick leave?
expected_answer_summary: A medical certificate is required for any sick leave exceeding 2 consecutive days and must be submitted within 48 hours of returning to work.

canonical_prompt: Can I take annual leave during my notice period?
paraphrases: I'm planning a trip during my notice period and I want to know if I can still take my annual leave?
What are the rules around taking annual leave while I'm still serving out my notice period?
I'm unsure if I can book a holiday during my notice period - can you clarify the company's policy?
I've got a week's annual leave booked for the end of my notice period but I'm worried it might be cancelled - what happens in cases like this?
expected_answer_summary: Annual leave during the notice period requires written approval from your manager and HR.
